queries.q: Write dashboard requirements for tracking activation funnel health for the growth team
The data team asked what we actually need on the new retention dashboard. Spec the metrics, charts, and filters.
I keep pulling the same ad-hoc numbers every Monday. Turn this into requirements for a persistent self-serve dashboard.
Define the KPI tracking view for the checkout redesign: which metrics, definitions, breakdowns, and refresh cadence
Spec out an executive dashboard that answers whether the marketplace is healthy, before quarterly planning
Document the reporting needs for support leadership: ticket volume trends, segment drill-downs, and who gets access
Our analytics team needs a requirements doc for the subscription revenue dashboard, including data sources and known quality issues
Put together what the mobile team's daily standup board should show: crash rate, DAU, release adoption, with drill-downs
I want stakeholders to self-serve product usage numbers instead of pinging me. Specify the dashboard they need.
Define requirements for a North Star metric dashboard with supporting input metrics and segment filters
Define which events and properties we need to start tracking in the checkout flow so we can measure it later
queries.notes: Event tracking feeds dashboards; instrument first, visualize second

queries.q: Score our Q2 OKRs now that the quarter closed and tell me which key results actually landed
queries.notes: OKR scoring at cycle close, not standing visibility

queries.q: Design an A/B test for the new onboarding checklist with sample size and duration
Why is my Grafana panel showing 'No data' for this Prometheus query?
Analyze the NPS survey responses we collected last month and pull out the themes
Write OKRs for the data platform team for next quarter
Engineering is about to build the referral feature. Document the analytics events contract they should implement.
queries.notes: Implementation-side tracking contract, not the dashboard layer

queries.q: The pricing experiment just finished. Write the readout with significance and a ship recommendation.
queries.notes: Experiment readout, not a standing dashboard

queries.q: Order new monitors for the analytics team's war room
Frame the problem statement for why nobody trusts our metrics before we build anything
